mission: UI redesign: Threads (Meta) 风格 + shadcn/ui 组件系统。极简黑白、圆角卡片、细线分割。安装 shadcn/ui + Radix UI

sprints.direction: Sprint 1: Install shadcn/ui + set up Threads design system foundation. Tasks: (1) npx shadcn@latest init with New York style, (2) configure Tailwind/CSS variables for Threads aesthetic (black/white/gray palette, thin borders, large rounded corners), (3) install needed shadcn components: button, card, badge, dialog, separator. (4) Update globals.css with Threads-inspired design tokens. Do NOT redesign pages yet — just set up the infrastructure.
